---
title: "Ankur Garg"
image: images/profile.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 10em
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/ankurgarg96
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/agarg-dev
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:ankurgarg.0496@gmail.com
---

## Bio

I am a PhD student in the Department of Electrical and Software Engineering at the **University of Calgary**, advised by **Prof. Samira Ebrahimi Kahou**. I received my **M.S. in Computer Science** from the **University of Southern California**.

My research focuses on **Machine Learning Interpretability** and **Large Language Models (LLMs)**. I am interested in deciphering the internal mechanisms of transformers to improve model transparency.

Previously, I was a Software Engineer at **Salesforce** and a Researcher at **Harvard University**.


## News

* **Jun 2026:** Submitted *"Discovering Latent Groups for Robust Classification"* (NCT) and wrote an accompanying [blog post](posts/nct/index.html).
* **Jun 2026:** Wrote a [blog post](blog.html) explaining our CLVQ-VAE interpretability framework.
* **Dec 2025:** Submitted our paper *"Cross-Layer Discrete Concept Discovery"*.
* **Oct 2025:** Presented our work *"Improving Pathology Foundation Models for Brain Tissue"* at the [AI in Medicine Symposium](https://cumming.ucalgary.ca/office/ofd/events-and-programming/ai-medicine-symposium-beyond-algorithm) and the [Alberta BME Conference](https://schulich.ucalgary.ca/biomedical/news-events/annual-alberta-biomedical-engineering-conference).
* **Jan 2025:** Started my PhD at the University of Calgary.
* **Mar 2023:** Completed my tenure as a Software Engineer at Salesforce.


## Service, Teaching & Outreach

**Organizing**

* Co-organizer, [Decoding Decisions: Explainability in ML & Sequential Decision Making](https://dd-xml.github.io/) Workshop, CRV 2025
* Co-organizer, [TAIH Symposium 2026](https://uofc-taih.github.io/symposium-2026/) (Transdisciplinary AI Hub), University of Calgary

**Reviewing**

* Reviewer, Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR)
* Reviewer, Conference on Language Modeling (COLM)
* Reviewer, ELLIS PhD Program (2025)

**Teaching**

* Teaching Assistant, Applied Machine Learning and Predictive Analytics (ENEL 682), University of Calgary, Winter 2025 & 2026
* Course Producer, Database Systems (CSCI 585), USC, Fall 2021

**Outreach**

* Instructor, Mission Science Program, 2020-2021
* Student Mentor, Robotics Coding Academy (USC STEM Outreach), 2020

## Scholarships & Awards

* **Faculty of Graduate Studies Doctoral Scholarship**, $15,000, University of Calgary, 2026
* **Eyes High Doctoral Recruitment Scholarship**, $26,000/year, University of Calgary, 2025-2029
* **ESE Graduate Research Award (2025-2026)**, $700, University of Calgary, 2025
* **ESE Graduate Research Award (2024-2025)**, $1,100, University of Calgary, 2025
* **SRM Performance Scholarship**, tuition rebate, SRM Institute, 2016-2017
